messages.content: Kids Choice Awards 2011 USA Released Date
The 2011 Kids Choice Awards in the USA were released on April 2, 2011.
Kids Choice Awards 2011 is a production of
The Kids Choice Awards 2011 was a production of Nickelodeon.
Daredevil is a production of
"Daredevil" is a production of Marvel Television and ABC Studios.
PAW Patrol The Movie is a production of
"PAW Patrol: The Movie" is a production of Nickelodeon Movies, Spin Master Entertainment, and Paramount Animation.
PAW Patrol The Movie USA Released Date
"PAW Patrol: The Movie" was released in the USA on August 20, 2021.
The Loud House Movie USA Released Date
"The Loud House Movie" was released in the USA on August 20, 2021.
The Loud House Movie is a production of
"The Loud House Movie" is a production of Nickelodeon Movies and Nickelodeon Animation Studios.
Hair Love USA Released Date
"Hair Love" was released in the USA on February 14, 2020.
Tangled Ever Affter USA Released Date
"Tangled Ever After" was released in the USA on January 13, 2012.
Disney's Tick Tock Tale USA Released Date
I'm sorry, but I couldn't find any information about a Disney's Tick Tock Tale movie. It's possible that it may not have been released or may not exist.
Tick Tock Tale USA Released Date
I apologize for the confusion. "Tick Tock Tale" is an animated short film produced by Walt Disney Animation Studios. It was released on October 8, 2010, in the USA.
